channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cal’s LA Bowl vs. UNLV takes on different feel as Bears begin makeover
item.description: Justin Wilcox has made several changes to Cal's coaching staff, but UNLV will have an interim head coach.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: Tom Brady reveals initial reaction to Bill Belichick taking North Carolina job
item.description: Former New England Patriots star Tom Brady weighed in Sunday on Bill Belichick's decision to take the North Carolina Tar Heels job last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James returns to score 18 in Lakers' win vs Grizzlies after missing 2 games with foot injury
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James returned to the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night in a 116-10 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break. James is fighting a left foot injury and and was away from the team most of last week because of personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: KYLE GLASER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: FIFA apologizes to Ukraine soccer body for Crimea map error at 2026 World Cup draw
item.description: ZURICH (AP) — FIFA apologized to the Ukrainian soccer federation for displaying a map during its World Cup qualifying draw that excluded Russia-occupied Crimea from the country’s territory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luka Doncic has triple-double with season-best 45 points in Mavs' 143-133 win over Warriors
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Luka Doncic had his 80th career triple-double with a season-high 45 points along with 13 assists and 11 rebounds, and the Dallas Mavericks beat Klay Thompson's former Golden State Warriors 143-133 on Sunday night in a second visit to Chase Center in just more than a month.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Seahawks QB Geno Smith exits with knee injury against Green Bay and will undergo testing
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — An awkward hit ended quarterback Geno Smith’s night and may have done serious damage to the Seahawks’ playoff chances. Smith left Seattle’s 30-13 loss to Green Bay on Sunday night with a right knee injury and was replaced by Sam Howell midway through the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS TALBOTT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Josh Allen has another huge game to lift Bills to a 48-42 victory that snaps Lions' winning streak
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Josh Allen took a shotgun snap, moved up in the pocket and backed up, rolled left and threw right. It was just another play, a 28-yard pass to James Cook, in the latest sensational performance by the potential NFL MVP.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants owner John Mara gets another aerial message trashing his team before loss to Ravens
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — New York Giants co-owner John Mara received another aerial message trashing his woeful team before Sunday's 35-14 loss to the Baltimore Ravens.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vintage performances by Davante Adams and Aaron Rodgers carry Jets past defenseless Jaguars 32-25
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Davante Adams and Aaron Rodgers gave the New York Jets' next general manager and head coach something to ponder with a glimpse into the past — and potentially the future.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Miami WR DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head against Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Miami receiver Grant DuBose was hospitalized in stable condition and undergoing further evaluation after being taken off the field on a stretcher following a helmet-to-helmet hit against the Houston Texans on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man United secures stunning late 2-1 comeback win against Man City
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Amad Diallo struck a 90th-minute winner as Manchester United staged a stunning late comeback to beat Manchester City 2-1 in the Premier League on Sunday. Four-time defending champion City led the Manchester derby 1-0 going into the 88th minute at the Etihad Stadium.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers' De'Vondre Campbell's refusal to enter game likely to lead to suspension: report
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers are likely to suspend linebacker De'Vondre Campbell over his refusal to enter a game against the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bluegrass rivalry enters new era with No. 5 Kentucky and Louisville led by Mark Pope and Pat Kelsey
item.description: LEXINGTON, Ky. (AP) — Transition remains for Mark Pope with No. 5 Kentucky and Pat Kelsey with Louisville, growing pains and all.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah runs road winning streak to six straight with 4-3 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has become true road warriors. Clayton Keller scored a power-play goal with 43.8 seconds remaining and the Utah Hockey Club rallied to beat the San Jose Sharks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Bishop's 60, Olympian 34
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops on Tuesday night with Olympian playing at Bishop's. The Knights were lead by Moana Peterson, junior guard poured in 15 and added a few steals. Also chipped with quite a few assists as well. Final score in this one Bishop's won 60-34.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: OF Mike Tauchman joins the Chicago White Sox with $1.95 million, 1-year contract
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike Tauchman is switching sides in Chicago. Chicago announced a $1.95 million, one-year contract for the outfielder on Wednesday. Tauchman, 34, grew up in Palatine, Illinois, about 35 miles northwest of Chicago, and played college ball for Bradley in Peoria, Illinois.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lawmaker wants ‘flag planting’ at OSU to be a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee, a lawmaker introduced a bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Joe Burrow's home broken into during Monday Night Football
item.description: Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow's home was broken into during Monday Night Football in the latest home invasion of a pro athlete in the U.S., authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: SJ Earthquakes welcome 3 new players in deadline trade
item.description: (KRON) – Three players have been traded to the San Jose Earthquakes, the team announced Monday. Defender Dave Romney and midfielders Ian Harkes and Mark-Anthony Kaye will be making their way to Silicon Valley from the New England Revolution.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4
